name: Ludan Engineering Co. Ltd.
summary: Ludan Engineering Co. Ltd. operates as an engineering company worldwide. It is involved in the provision of engineering and project management services that include management, planning, procurement, and construction services, as well as turn-key services; technological solutions for industrial wastewater; consultation and construction of land and groundwater; and treatment of exhaust gases, contaminated water, and sewage. The company also develops, manufactures, and installs computerized ticketing systems, entrance control systems, and vehicle fleet management systems; produces automated testing systems; provides real-time command and control systems and feasibility testing services; and implements international management software. In addition, it engages in the planning solutions and supply of systems and equipment in the fields of building control, security, and access control and multimedia systems, as well as operation and maintenance of the systems; and development of solutions for information security for infrastructure companies and industrial factories. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Petah Tikva, Israel.
